sections.paragraph:
- Original: Αἰθίοψ

- Transliteration: Aithiops

- Phonetic: ahee-thee'-ops

- Definition: Ethiopian = "black"

1. an Ethiopian

- Origin: from aitho (to scorch) and ops (the face, from G3700)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From αἴθω aithō (to scorch) and ὤψō ps (the face from G3700); an Ethiopian (as a blackamoor): - Ethiopian.
